title: Fix enum range constraints missing for rand variables in sub-objects

features.name: rand sub-object with enum typed rand variable
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand sub-object containing an enum-typed rand variable, where the sub-object is randomized through the parent's randomize() call

features.name: two-level nested rand sub-objects with enum at deepest level
features.description: Code should include two levels of rand sub-objects where the innermost has an enum-typed rand variable, with randomize() called on the top-level object

features.name: non-contiguous enum values in rand sub-object
features.description: Code should include an enum with non-contiguous values used as a rand variable inside a rand sub-object, where randomize() on the parent may produce invalid enum values
